column10: At TRG, we work in a global environment where every diverse personality and culture is included. We look for talented people all over the world who have a passion for what they do and work together, shoulder to shoulder, to empower our customers in their fight against crime and terror.Though technology is important, people always come first!Our Core Values are our DNA, so if your DNA matches ours, you are at the right place!Whatever it takes! We follow a can-do approach, taking responsibility for milestonesPassion is our fuel! We Learn. We Grow. We InnovateWe make an impact! We bring innovation and always ask whyWe work together! One for all, and all for one.About YouWe're looking for a curious, driven engineer at the start of their career who is excited about working across data and software engineering. You'll work with diverse datasets, build backend microservices, and contribute to the full data and product layer. University projects, personal work, and internships all count - we care about how you think and learn, not just what you've shipped professionally.AI is central to what we build and how we work. One of the real engineering challenges we tackle is making large-scale data accessible to AI - datasets that are too large to fit in any LLM's context window. You'll grow into designing solutions around this: working with RAG pipelines, building AI agents that retrieve and reason over data intelligently, and contributing to multi-agent systems that cut the time it takes our users to reach critical insights. This space is evolving fast across the whole industry, so you won't be behind - you'll be learning alongside everyone else.You'll work close to the product - everyone here shares responsibility for what we ship and how it behaves in production. We move fast and the landscape changes constantly, and we'll support you in building the confidence to move with it.What You’ll Work OnBuild and extend AI agents and multi-agent systems that retrieve, reason over, and surface insights from complex datasetsDesign and implement RAG pipelines that make large-scale data accessible to LLMs - solving the fundamental challenge of data volumes that exceed context window limitsBuild and maintain data pipelines and processing workflows across a variety of data domains and formatsWork with a range of databases suited to different data needs (e.g. ClickHouse, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch) - schema design, query writing, and integration patternsDevelop backend microservices with FastAPI, contributing to a broader event-driven architectureCollaborate closely with product, design, and other engineers in a cross-functional setup - contributing to product decisions, not just implementationWrite clean Python with attention to code quality, testability, and maintainabilityUse AI-assisted tools actively throughout your daily workflowWhat we’re looking for:Solid Python foundation - you've built things with Python, whether in university projects, personal work, or an internship; you care about writing code that others can read and maintainSome exposure to data or backend work - pipelines, databases, APIs, or any hands-on experience working with data; a strong university project countsAwareness of web backend concepts - basic understanding of how APIs and services are structured; direct experience with FastAPI or similar frameworks is a plusCuriosity about event-driven systems - you've heard of or read about async patterns, message queues, or event streaming and want to go deeperInterest in AI agents and RAG - you understand or are actively learning how LLMs work, what context window constraints mean in practice, and why retrieval-augmented approaches matter for real-world data problems; prior hands-on experience is a plus but not requiredCare for code quality - you think about structure, readability, and testing, even if you're still developing these habitsEagerness to learn and adapt - you don't need all the answers; you ask good questions, take feedback well, and keep movingGenuine interest in AI-augmented development - you're curious about or already experimenting with AI tools in your workflow; we'll help you build real fluency in using them autonomously, not just as a chatbotProduct mindset - you care about the "why" behind the work, not just the "what"; you want to understand what you're building and for whomNice to have:Hands-on experience with any of our current databases: ClickHouse, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or ElasticsearchExposure to vector databases or embedding-based search (e.g. pgvector, Qdrant, Weaviate)Experience with LLM APIs and agent frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, or similar)Familiarity with orchestration tools (Airflow, Prefect, Dagster, or similar)Your perks:Working from home Hit your goals from the comfort of your home because we value the performance, not the placeFlexible hours because we promote work-life balanceYearly performance bonus to reward good performance and hard workPaid medical insurance because we like to take care of youDaily lunch allowance so you can save lots of money, time, and effort by enjoying your free lunch at the office or home every daySport/Gym(Exercise) allowance to focus more on yourself, your well-being, and your health.Udemy unlimited subscription to promote your learning and development and grow your careerOnboarding plan and training so that you have a smooth induction and feel confident and ready to take over your new roleEquipment support so you have all the tools to do effectively and efficiently your workNo dress code because we want you to be as comfortable as possibleGifts and rewards for celebrating birthdays, anniversaries, and personal milestonesHappy hours, coffee time, online team building, company events, and much more to promote team bonding and of course to have fun!Fresh fruit, snacks, coffee, and tea at the office because work makes us hungry!About UsTRG TECH RESEARCH GROUP LIMITED deals with Data Fusion and AI products for civilian protection.Our mission is to empower our customers to fight crime and terror through state-of-the-art technologies that provide accurate and precise intelligence.Our product, Intellectus, is the only cloud-based all-in-one fusion platform with integrated web intelligence, discovery capabilities, advertisement intelligence, virtual ID management, and third-party database integration that can be deployed in less than 24 hours.Want to learn more? Visit our website at www.trgint.com and our LinkedIn page.TRG TECH RESEARCH GROUP LIMITED processes and/or controls all data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) 2016/679. For more information, visit our Privacy Policy.Powered by JazzHRJrIWHgiuOuShow moreShow less
column24: The job description and the candidate's profile match closely.
column27: Based on the job description and the candidate's profile, it is likely that the candidate has the necessary skills and experience for the position. The relevance score of 0.8 indicates a strong match between the two.
